remarks.name: Garry Tan
remarks.role: President & CEO ycombinator —Founder garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
remarks.text:
“What happened to state Sen. Scott Wiener at the Trans March celebration last week was neither inclusion, righteousness nor speaking truth to power. It was not a protest; it was a mob. And Democrats — all of us — need to say so, loudly and without equivocation.”

https://t.co/Wq3FQnkgOI
remarks.translation: “上周，州参议员斯科特·维纳（ Scott Wiener ）在跨界三月庆祝活动中所发生的事情既不是包容、正义，也不是对权力说真话。这不是抗议，而是一群暴徒。民主党人--我们所有人--需要大声、毫不含糊地这么说。”

remarks.text:
I took my son to the USMNT game yesterday against Bosnia.

After the game I asked him his favorite part and he said: “the giant flag and the national anthem”

This country has given us everything. 

Cannot be more grateful. https://t.co/OgsVN62Ilf
remarks.translation: 昨天我带儿子参加了USMNT对阵波斯尼亚的比赛。比赛结束后，我问他最喜欢的部分，他说： “巨旗和国歌”这个国家给了我们一切。再感激不过了。

remarks.name: Aaron Levie
remarks.role: ceo box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI
remarks.text:
The deployment of AI in the enterprise beyond just interacting with a chatbot will unequivocally take real work to align AI systems to the underlying business processes they’re involved in and drive the desired outcomes.

Most workflows weren’t designed for AI agents to just drop into. Workflows today in the enterprise deal with fragmented data, legacy software systems that agents can’t connect with, institutional instead of documented knowledge, and more.

To deploy agents reliably at scale you need to get data cleaned up, modernize IT systems, figure out evals, drive change management for the new end state process, and so on. This also involves designing where humans remain in the loop (which will mean entirely new ways people interact with the workflows), and figuring out what a company’s new IP looks like. 

This is why so many applied AI companies are expanding FDE efforts and launching deploycos, and why the FDE role will be one of the most critical jobs in tech going forward. There’s a tremendous amount of work to be done on this front.
remarks.translation:
除了与聊天机器人交互之外，在企业中部署AI将毫不含糊地采取实际工作，使AI系统与他们参与的底层业务流程保持一致，并推动预期的结果。大多数工作流并非专为AIAgent设计的。如今，企业中的工作流处理的是碎片化数据、座席无法连接的传统软件系统、机构而非文档化知识等。
要大规模可靠地部署Agent，您需要清理数据、现代化IT系统、计算预测、为新的最终状态流程推动变更管理等。这还涉及设计人类在循环中的位置（这意味着人们与工作流交互的全新方式） ，并弄清楚公司的新IP是什么样的。
这就是为什么如此多的应用AI公司正在扩大FDE工作并启动部署的原因，以及为什么FDE角色将成为未来技术领域最重要的工作之一。在这方面还有大量的工作要做。
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.name: Peter Yang
remarks.role: Practical AI tutorials and interviews for busy people
remarks.text:
How I’m getting the most out of Fable before July 7:

1. Prep context with cheaper models
2. Plan with Fable, execute with another model
3. Use lower effort, like Medium, and babysit what Fable is doing

📌 Watch my full tutorial for 5 Fable-worthy use cases to try: https://t.co/XElMEV3FwK
remarks.translation: 我如何在7月7日之前充分利用寓言。使用更便宜的型号准备上下文2.用寓言计划，用另一个模型执行3.使用较低的努力，如Medium ，并照看寓言正在做的事情📌观看我的完整教程，了解5个值得寓言的用例，以尝试：
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察模型运行、算力、存储、sandbox 或开发平台基础设施的变化；后续事实判断需回到原始公告或技术文档。

remarks.name: Nikunj Kothari
remarks.role: partner fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire meter, opendoor, atlassian & others. love shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧
remarks.text:
It’s AGI summer and I’m seeing plenty of “tourists” who are visiting SF - just like last year..

And, then they go back and say SF has no soul, it’s just 996 culture and it’s just AI. Also it’s dirty and smells - and did you notice the homeless?

While there is some truth to ALL the claims, you really shouldn’t judge this city on a few days (or honestly even weeks). 

Don’t be a tourist, and spend time here. Booms and busts will happen. But, it really can be wonderful. And if it’s not for you, then it’s not for you. Go make the place you’re going back to all that you want it to be. 

(Signed by someone who’s been here 14 years)
remarks.translation:
这是AGI的夏天，我看到很多“游客”正在访问旧金山-就像去年一样。然后，他们回去说旧金山没有灵魂，它只是996文化，它只是AI。此外，这里又脏又臭-您注意到无家可归者了吗？虽然所有的说法都有一定道理，但你真的不应该在几天（甚至几周）内评判这座城市。不要游客，在这里度过美好时光。繁荣和萧条将会发生。但是，它真的可以很棒。
如果它不适合你，那就不适合你。去把你要回去的地方变成你想要的样子。（由在这里工作了14年的人签名）
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Peter Yang
remarks.role: Practical AI tutorials and interviews for busy people
remarks.text:
Thought I’d share a fun activity I did with my 8-year-old daughter and Codex today:

1. She drew a picture of a dragon.

2. We uploaded her drawing to Codex and used image gen to make a few more dragon poses. She used voice to give Codex feedback until we got the result below.

3. We sent it to customstickers(dot)com to print sticker sheets (it's about $20 for 10 sheets).

Now she can share her stickers with her friends when they arrive in the mail next week. Try it if you have kids stuck at home this summer :)
remarks.translation:
我想今天和我8岁的女儿和Codex分享一个有趣的活动： 1.她画了一幅龙的画。2.我们将她的绘画上传到Codex ，并使用图像生成制作了更多的龙姿势。她用声音给Codex反馈，直到我们得到下面的结果。3.我们将其发送到customstickers (dot) com以打印贴纸（ 10张约20 $ ）。现在，当她的朋友下周到达时，她可以与他们分享她的贴纸。
如果您今年夏天有孩子被困在家里，不妨试试:)
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Guillermo Rauch
remarks.role: vercel CEO
remarks.text:
We've been explaining AI Gateway as a C̶o̶n̶t̶e̶n̶t̶ Token Delivery Network. Like a CDN for AI models.

One great feature of CDNs is the ability to dynamically re-route or deny traffic without redeployment.

When Fable was suddenly retired, we worried about production workloads depending on it. Even Fable aside, models get retired quite often as GPU capacity is heavily contested. Yet our data shows people still having happy production traffic of older model versions!

We're solving this now with AI Gateway Rules. e.g.: you can now rewrite model "routes" on the fly!

𝚟𝚎𝚛𝚌𝚎𝚕 𝚊𝚒-𝚐𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚠𝚊𝚢 𝚛𝚞𝚕𝚎𝚜 𝚊𝚍𝚍 \
  --𝚝𝚢𝚙𝚎 𝚛𝚎𝚠𝚛𝚒𝚝𝚎 \
  --𝚜𝚘𝚞𝚛𝚌𝚎 𝚊𝚗𝚝𝚑𝚛𝚘𝚙𝚒𝚌/𝚌𝚕𝚊𝚞𝚍𝚎-𝚏𝚊𝚋𝚕𝚎-𝟻 \
  --𝚍𝚎𝚜𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚊𝚗𝚝𝚑𝚛𝚘𝚙𝚒𝚌/𝚌𝚕𝚊𝚞𝚍𝚎-𝚘𝚙𝚞𝚜-𝟻

This adds to the repertoire of capabilities and techniques AI Gateway brings to the table to recover lost tokens. If you drop tokens, you lose revenue and customers 💸

Kudos to @rtaneja_ @crowprose @shaper – we went from CLI design to production-grade capability very quickly!
remarks.translation:
我们一直在将AI网关解释为C、o、n、t、e、n、t、Token Delivery Network。就像AI模型的CDN一样。CDN的一大特点是无需重新部署即可动态重新路由或拒绝流量。当寓言突然退役时，我们担心生产工作量取决于它。即使不考虑寓言，由于GPU容量竞争激烈，型号也经常退役。然而，我们的数据显示，人们仍然拥有旧型号版本的快乐生产流量！
我们现在正在使用AI网关规则来解决这个问题。例如：您现在可以即时重写模型“路由” ！这增加了能力和技术网关带到表以恢复丢失的令牌。
如果您丢弃代币，您将失去收入和客户的💸赞誉，转而使用@ rtaneja_@ crowprose @ shaper –我们很快就从CLI设计转变为生产级功能！
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察模型运行、算力、存储、sandbox 或开发平台基础设施的变化；后续事实判断需回到原始公告或技术文档。

remarks.name: Cat Wu
remarks.role: claude code + cowork anthropicai, prev: dagster, scale_ai
remarks.text:
Claude Tag is unlocking productivity across our entire org: eng, product, data, sales, marketing. Our internal version lands 65% of product PRs.

We cover the CEO/CTO playbook for rolling it out, why security was designed in from day one, and what this means for the future of work.
remarks.translation: Claude Tag正在释放我们整个组织的生产力：工程、产品、数据、销售、营销。我们的内部版本占据了65%的产品PR。我们涵盖了推出该计划的首席执行官/首席技术官手册，为什么从一开始就设计了安全性，以及这对未来的工作意味着什么。

A recent college grad told me that when they were in school, they would feed the lecture decks to an AI and ask it to teach the material (instead of attending the actual lecture)

They often found that the AI taught better than the professors

remarks.name: Matt Turck
remarks.role: VC at FirstMarkCap.  Host: MAD Podcast; Organizer: Data Driven NYC, Author: MAD Landscape.
remarks.text:
Inside Nemotron and NVIDIA's AI lab: my conversation with Bryan Catanzaro (@ctnzr).  

@nvidia is a chip company. So why does it put hundreds of researchers on building AI models - and then give them away for free? We go deep into the Nemotron models, what it takes to build a top AI lab, and the future of frontier AI. 

01:33 -   Is open source AI catching the frontier?

05:29 -  Do closed labs blocking distillation slow open source down?

07:42 -  Is the US falling behind China?

10:30 - Why companies actually choose open models

12:39 -  A "crazy" 2008 bet: machine learning on GPUs

15:33 - Working with Andrew Ng and Dario Amodei at Baidu

17:41 - Coming back to NVIDIA: DLSS and the birth of Megatron

21:55 - The real reason NVIDIA builds its own models

24:28 - Is Moore's Law really dead?

33:37 - The Nemotron family: Nano, Super, Ultra

35:09 - Built for agents: why NVIDIA bets on speed

36:02 - How you train a 550B model in 4 bits

39:25 - Hybrid Mamba-Transformer, explained simply

42:31 - Mixture of experts, and why NVIDIA built NVL72 around it

47:26 - Why a 1-million-token context window matters

49:26 - Multi-token prediction: how the model predicts 5 tokens at once

52:47 - Multi-teacher distillation: teaching one model from many

58:01 - Where reinforcement learning goes next

01:00:16 - Inside NVIDIA's research org: "the mission is the boss"

01:04:03 - How NVIDIA decides who gets the GPUs

01:10:53 - Why NVIDIA still feels entrepreneurial after 33 years

01:12:58 - Why Bryan doesn't believe in the singularity

01:17:50 - The AI backlash

01:19:18 - The controversial case: open AI is safer than closed
remarks.translation:
深入了解Nemotron和NVIDIA的AI实验室：我与Bryan Catanzaro (@ ctnzr)的对话。@ nvidia是一家芯片公司。那么，为什么它要让数百名研究人员构建AI模型，然后免费提供给他们呢？我们深入研究了Nemotron模型，建立顶级AI实验室需要什么，以及前沿AI的未来。01:33 -开源AI是否赶上了前沿？ 05:29 -封闭实验室阻断蒸馏是否会减缓开源速度？
07:42 -美国是否落后于中国？ 10:30 -为什么公司实际上选择开放模型12:39 - “疯狂”的2008年赌注： GPU上的机器学习15:33 -在百度17:41与Andrew Ng和Dario Amodei合作-回到NVIDIA ： DLSS和Megatron 21:55的诞生- NVIDIA建立自己的模型的真正原因24:28 -摩尔定律真的死了吗？
33:37 - Nemotron家族： Nano、Super、Ultra 35:09 -专为Agent商打造：为什么NVIDIA在速度上下注36:02 -如何用4位训练550B模型39:25 - Hybrid Mamba-Transformer ，简单解释42:31 -专家的混合，以及NVIDIA为什么围绕它构建NVL72 47:26 -为什么100万令牌的上下文窗口很重要49:26 -多令牌预测：模型如何一次预测5个令牌52:47 -多教师蒸馏：从许多58:01中教授一个模型
接下来是水泥学习01:00:16 -英伟达研究组织内部： “使命是老板” 01:04:03 -英伟达如何决定谁获得GPU 01:10:53 -为什么英伟达在33年后仍然感到创业01:12:58 -为什么布莱恩不相信奇点01:17:50 -AI的反弹01:19:18 -有争议的案例：开放式AI比封闭式AI更安全
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.text:
Nothing is more fulfilling than connecting people with opportunity. 

Even when you have absolutely nothing to gain from it. 

It’s an abundant world where everything doesn’t need to be zero sum. Don’t let the gatekeepers tell you otherwise.
remarks.translation: 没有什么比将人们与机会联系起来更令人满意的了。即使你从中完全没有什么好处。这是一个丰富多彩的世界，一切都不需要是零和的。不要让守门人告诉你其他事情。
